clusters.justification: These terms share robust co-activation within the salience and early limbic systems (e.g., amygdala, anterior insula, dACC), representing the broad generation, processing, and regulation of emotional and somatic arousal states.

Anchored by ventral striatal and orbitofrontal/ventromedial prefrontal circuitry, this axis reflects the calculation of expected outcomes, reinforcement contingencies, and the integration of incentives to drive goal-directed behavior.

Mapping heavily onto the Default Mode Network (e.g., mPFC, PCC, TPJ), this macro-domain represents internally-directed processing used to construct complex associative representations encompassing autobiographical memory, self-concept, and the minds of others.
